items.definition_en: A patio is a flat area outside a house for sitting or eating.
items.example_en: We ate breakfast on the patio.

items.definition_en: A path is a narrow track for people to walk on.
items.example_en: The path leads to the back gate.

items.definition_en: A terrace is a flat area next to a building where people can sit.
items.example_en: We sat on the terrace and drank tea.

items.definition_en: A deck is a flat wooden floor outside a house.
items.example_en: She put some chairs on the deck.

items.definition_en: A driveway is a short road leading from the street to a house.
items.example_en: He parked his car in the driveway.

items.definition_en: A paving stone is a flat stone used to make a hard surface outside.
items.example_en: They put new paving stones in the garden.

items.definition_en: Gravel is small pieces of stone often used on garden paths.
items.example_en: The path was covered in gravel.

items.definition_en: Mulch is material spread on the ground to protect plants.
items.example_en: We put mulch around the trees.

items.definition_en: A flagstone is a thin flat stone used to make a path.
items.example_en: The flagstones in the yard were uneven.

items.definition_en: A stepping stone is a stone for walking across wet ground.
items.example_en: Children jumped from stepping stone to stepping stone.

items.definition_en: A border is the edge or line around a garden or surface.
items.example_en: Plants grew along the border of the path.

items.definition_en: A bed is a small area of ground set aside for plants.
items.example_en: The flower bed was full of tulips.

items.definition_en: A patio slab is a flat piece of stone for a patio surface.
items.example_en: We laid new patio slabs this spring.

items.definition_en: A terrace wall is a wall used to hold soil on a slope.
items.example_en: The terrace wall was made of bricks.

items.definition_en: A boardwalk is a wooden path, usually in a garden or park.
items.example_en: They built a boardwalk over the wet ground.

items.definition_en: A stepping path is a path made of flat stones or bricks.
items.example_en: The stepping path goes around the pond.

items.definition_en: A garden tile is a flat piece of material for outdoor floors.
items.example_en: The patio was covered with garden tiles.

items.definition_en: A walkway is a path made for walking.
items.example_en: A stone walkway led to the house.

items.definition_en: Shingle is small round stones on the ground or a path.
items.example_en: The garden path was made of shingle.

items.definition_en: A courtyard is an open space surrounded by walls or buildings.
items.example_en: They had lunch in the garden courtyard.
